title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Naukri.com Capital India

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Software Engineer at Naukri.com Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Naukri.com Capital India has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Aurangabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Naukri.com Capital India:
Naukri.com Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Naukri.com Capital India!
